revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 棚倉孫神社 |画像 = [[画像:Tanakurahiko Jinja Torii.jpg|280px]]
鳥居（後方に拝殿） |所在地 = [[京都府]][[京田辺市]]田辺棚倉49 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 49 | 緯度秒 = 17 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 45 | 経度秒 = 48 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP-26 | ラベル位置 = 左 |祭神 = [[天香山命|天香古山命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]（大）
旧[[郷社]] |創建 = [[推古天皇]]31年（[[623年]]） |本殿 = [[流造]] |別名 = |例祭 = [[10月15日]] |神事 = |地図 = Japan Kyoto }} '''棚倉孫神社'''（たなくらひこじんじゃ）は、[[京都府]][[京田辺市]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内大社]]で、[[旧社格]]は郷社。 == 歴史 == === 概史 === 社伝によると、[[推古天皇]]31年（[[623年]]）に[[相楽郡]]棚倉之荘から勧請されたとされる。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』では大社に列格していた。[[江戸時代]]には「天満宮」と呼ばれていた。[[昭和]]6年（[[1931年]]）[[2月]][[郷社]]に列格した。 === 神階 === *[[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下から従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』）- 表記は「棚倉孫神」 == 文化財 == [[ファイル:Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|thumb|220px|{{center|本殿}}]] [[ファイル:Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|thumb|200px|{{center|瑞饋神輿}}]] *本殿（[[京都府]][[登録有形文化財]]） [[桃山時代]]の建立。 *瑞饋神輿（[[京田辺市]]無形文化財） 例祭に合わせて、瑞饋・唐辛子・金柑・千日紅・白米・豆類等を使用して瑞饋神輿（ずいきみこし）を製作し、[[10月]][[体育の日]]に氏子区域を巡行する。 == 交通アクセス == *[[西日本旅客鉄道|JR西日本]][[学研都市線]][[京田辺駅]]から徒歩10分 *[[近畿日本鉄道|近鉄]][[近鉄京都線|京都線]][[新田辺駅]]から徒歩15分 == 外部リンク == *[http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ 棚倉孫神社]-（公式サイト） {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たなくらひこしんしや}} [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] [[Category:山城国の式内社]]

鳥居（後方に拝殿） |所在地 = [[京都府]][[京田辺市]]田辺棚倉49 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 49 | 緯度秒 = 17 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 45 | 経度秒 = 48 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP-26 | ラベル位置 = 左 |祭神 = [[天香山命|天香古山命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]（大）
旧[[郷社]] |創建 = [[推古天皇]]31年（[[623年]]） |本殿 = [[流造]] |別名 = |例祭 = [[10月15日]] |神事 = |地図 = Japan Kyoto }} '''棚倉孫神社'''（たなくらひこじんじゃ）は、[[京都府]][[京田辺市]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内大社]]で、[[旧社格]]は郷社。 == 歴史 == === 概史 === 社伝によると、[[推古天皇]]31年（[[623年]]）に[[相楽郡]]棚倉之荘から勧請されたとされる。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』では大社に列格していた。[[江戸時代]]には「天満宮」と呼ばれていた。[[昭和]]6年（[[1931年]]）[[2月]][[郷社]]に列格した。 === 神階 === *[[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下から従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』）- 表記は「棚倉孫神」 == 文化財 == [[ファイル:Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|thumb|220px|{{center|本殿}}]] [[ファイル:Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|thumb|200px|{{center|瑞饋神輿}}]] *本殿（[[京都府]][[登録有形文化財]]） [[桃山時代]]の建立。 *瑞饋神輿（[[京田辺市]]無形文化財） 例祭に合わせて、瑞饋・唐辛子・金柑・千日紅・白米・豆類等を使用して瑞饋神輿（ずいきみこし）を製作し、[[10月]][[体育の日]]に氏子区域を巡行する。 == 交通アクセス == *[[西日本旅客鉄道|JR西日本]][[学研都市線]][[京田辺駅]]から徒歩10分 *[[近畿日本鉄道|近鉄]][[近鉄京都線|京都線]][[新田辺駅]]から徒歩15分 == 外部リンク == *[http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ 棚倉孫神社]-（公式サイト） {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たなくらひこしんしや}} [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市の建築物]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] [[Category:山城国の式内社]]

鳥居と拝殿 |所在地 = [[京都府]][[京田辺市]]田辺棚倉49 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[天香山命|天香古山命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]（大）
旧[[郷社]] |創建 = [[推古天皇]]31年（[[623年]]） |本殿 = [[流造]] |別名 = |例祭 = [[10月15日]] |神事 = |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=棚倉孫神社|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''棚倉孫神社'''（たなくらひこじんじゃ）は、[[京都府]][[京田辺市]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内大社]]で、[[旧社格]]は郷社。 == 歴史 == === 概史 === 社伝によると、[[推古天皇]]31年（[[623年]]）に[[相楽郡]]棚倉之荘から勧請されたとされる。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』では大社に列格していた。[[江戸時代]]には「天満宮」と呼ばれていた。[[昭和]]6年（[[1931年]]）[[2月]][[郷社]]に列格した。 === 神階 === *[[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下から従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』）- 表記は「棚倉孫神」 == 文化財 == *本殿（[[京都府]][[登録有形文化財]]） [[桃山時代]]の建立。 *瑞饋神輿（[[京田辺市]]無形文化財） 例祭に合わせて、瑞饋・唐辛子・金柑・千日紅・白米・豆類等を使用して瑞饋神輿（ずいきみこし）を製作し、[[10月]][[体育の日]]に氏子区域を巡行する。 Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|本殿 Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|瑞饋神輿 == 交通アクセス == *[[西日本旅客鉄道|JR西日本]][[学研都市線]][[京田辺駅]]から徒歩10分 *[[近畿日本鉄道|近鉄]][[近鉄京都線|京都線]][[新田辺駅]]から徒歩15分 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *{{Wayback|url=http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ |title=棚倉孫神社 |date=20090225193248}}-（公式サイト） {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たなくらひこしんしや}} [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市の建築物]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] [[Category:山城国の式内社]]

{{nihongo|'''Tanakurahiko Shrine'''|棚倉孫神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tanakurahiko Shrine'''|棚倉孫神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tanakurahiko Shrine'''|棚倉孫神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tanakurahiko Shrine'''|棚倉孫神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tanakurahiko Shrine'''|棚倉孫神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tanakurahiko Shrine'''|棚倉孫神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tanakurahiko Shrine'''|棚倉孫神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tanakurahiko Shrine'''|棚倉孫神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tanakurahiko Shrine'''|棚倉孫神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tanakurahiko Shrine'''|棚倉孫神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

revision.comment: 5 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 棚倉孫神社 |画像 = [[画像:Tanakurahiko Jinja Torii.jpg|270px]]
鳥居と拝殿 |所在地 = [[京都府]][[京田辺市]]田辺棚倉49 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[天香山命|天香古山命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]（大）
旧[[郷社]] |創建 = [[推古天皇]]31年（[[623年]]） |本殿 = [[流造]] |別名 = |例祭 = [[10月15日]] |神事 = |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=棚倉孫神社|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''棚倉孫神社'''（たなくらひこじんじゃ）は、[[京都府]][[京田辺市]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内大社]]で、[[旧社格]]は郷社。 == 歴史 == === 概史 === 社伝によると、[[推古天皇]]31年（[[623年]]）に[[相楽郡]]棚倉之荘から勧請されたとされる。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』では大社に列格していた。[[江戸時代]]には「天満宮」と呼ばれていた。[[昭和]]6年（[[1931年]]）[[2月]][[郷社]]に列格した。 === 神階 === *[[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下から従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』）- 表記は「棚倉孫神」 == 文化財 == *本殿（[[京都府]][[登録有形文化財]]） [[桃山時代]]の建立。 *瑞饋神輿（[[京田辺市]]無形文化財） 例祭に合わせて、瑞饋・唐辛子・金柑・千日紅・白米・豆類等を使用して瑞饋神輿（ずいきみこし）を製作し、[[10月]][[体育の日]]に氏子区域を巡行する。 Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|本殿 Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|瑞饋神輿 == 交通アクセス == *[[西日本旅客鉄道|JR西日本]][[学研都市線]][[京田辺駅]]から徒歩10分 *[[近畿日本鉄道|近鉄]][[近鉄京都線|京都線]][[新田辺駅]]から徒歩15分 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *{{Wayback|url=http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ |title=棚倉孫神社 |date=20090225193248}}-（公式サイト） {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たなくらひこしんしや}} [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市の建築物]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] [[Category:山城国の式内社]]

鳥居と拝殿 |所在地 = [[京都府]][[京田辺市]]田辺棚倉49 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[天香山命|天香古山命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]（大）
旧[[郷社]] |創建 = [[推古天皇]]31年（[[623年]]） |本殿 = [[流造]] |別名 = |例祭 = [[10月15日]] |神事 = |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=棚倉孫神社|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''棚倉孫神社'''（たなくらひこじんじゃ）は、[[京都府]][[京田辺市]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内大社]]で、[[旧社格]]は郷社。 == 歴史 == === 概史 === 社伝によると、[[推古天皇]]31年（[[623年]]）に[[相楽郡]]棚倉之荘から勧請されたとされる。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』では大社に列格していた。[[江戸時代]]には「天満宮」と呼ばれていた。[[昭和]]6年（[[1931年]]）[[2月]][[郷社]]に列格した。 === 神階 === *[[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下から従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』）- 表記は「棚倉孫神」 == 文化財 == *本殿（[[京都府]][[登録有形文化財]]） [[桃山時代]]の建立。 *瑞饋神輿（[[京田辺市]]無形文化財） 例祭に合わせて、瑞饋・唐辛子・金柑・千日紅・白米・豆類等を使用して瑞饋神輿（ずいきみこし）を製作し、[[10月]][[体育の日]]に氏子区域を巡行する。 Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|本殿 Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|瑞饋神輿 == 交通アクセス == *[[西日本旅客鉄道|JR西日本]][[学研都市線]][[京田辺駅]]から徒歩10分 *[[近畿日本鉄道|近鉄]][[近鉄京都線|京都線]][[新田辺駅]]から徒歩15分 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *{{Wayback|url=http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ |title=棚倉孫神社 |date=20090225193248}}-（公式サイト） {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市の建築物]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] [[Category:山城国の式内社]] ==End Japanese==

Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 棚倉孫神社 |画像 = [[画像:Tanakurahiko Jinja Torii.jpg|270px]]
鳥居と拝殿 |所在地 = [[京都府]][[京田辺市]]田辺棚倉49 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[天香山命|天香古山命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]（大）
旧[[郷社]] |創建 = [[推古天皇]]31年（[[623年]]） |本殿 = [[流造]] |別名 = |例祭 = [[10月15日]] |神事 = |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=棚倉孫神社|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''棚倉孫神社'''（たなくらひこじんじゃ）は、[[京都府]][[京田辺市]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内大社]]で、[[旧社格]]は郷社。 == 歴史 == === 概史 === 社伝によると、[[推古天皇]]31年（[[623年]]）に[[相楽郡]]棚倉之荘から勧請されたとされる。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』では大社に列格していた。[[江戸時代]]には「天満宮」と呼ばれていた。[[昭和]]6年（[[1931年]]）[[2月]][[郷社]]に列格した。 === 神階 === *[[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下から従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』）- 表記は「棚倉孫神」 == 文化財 == *本殿（[[京都府]][[登録有形文化財]]） [[桃山時代]]の建立。 *瑞饋神輿（[[京田辺市]]無形文化財） 例祭に合わせて、瑞饋・唐辛子・金柑・千日紅・白米・豆類等を使用して瑞饋神輿（ずいきみこし）を製作し、[[10月]][[体育の日]]に氏子区域を巡行する。 Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|本殿 Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|瑞饋神輿 == 交通アクセス == *[[西日本旅客鉄道|JR西日本]][[学研都市線]][[京田辺駅]]から徒歩10分 *[[近畿日本鉄道|近鉄]][[近鉄京都線|京都線]][[新田辺駅]]から徒歩15分 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *{{Wayback|url=http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ |title=棚倉孫神社 |date=20090225193248}}-（公式サイト） {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市の建築物]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] [[Category:山城国の式内社]]

{{nihongo|'''Tanakurahiko Shrine'''|棚倉孫神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''棚倉孫神社'''（たなくらひこじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|京都府|Q120730}}{{jalink|京田辺市|Q816728}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|式内大社|Q134917288}}で、{{jalink|旧社格}}は郷社。 === 歴史 === === 概史 === 社伝によると、{{jalink|推古天皇|Q298057}}31年（{{jalink|623年|Q31044}}）に{{jalink|相楽郡|Q1154661}}棚倉之荘から勧請されたとされる。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』では大社に列格していた。{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}には「天満宮」と呼ばれていた。{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}6年（{{jalink|1931年|Q18782}}）{{jalink|2月|Q109}}{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}に列格した。 === 神階 === *{{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下から従五位上（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』）- 表記は「棚倉孫神」 === 文化財 === *本殿（{{jalink|京都府|Q120730}}{{jalink|登録有形文化財|Q11579194}}） {{jalink|桃山時代}}の建立。 *瑞饋神輿（{{jalink|京田辺市|Q816728}}無形文化財） 例祭に合わせて、瑞饋・唐辛子・金柑・千日紅・白米・豆類等を使用して瑞饋神輿（ずいきみこし）を製作し、{{jalink|10月|Q124}}{{jalink|体育の日}}に氏子区域を巡行する。 Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|本殿 Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|瑞饋神輿 === 交通アクセス === *{{jalink|西日本旅客鉄道|Q502125|JR西日本}}{{jalink|学研都市線}}{{jalink|京田辺駅|Q855813}}から徒歩10分 *{{jalink|近畿日本鉄道|Q1531085|近鉄}}{{jalink|近鉄京都線|Q1057349|京都線}}{{jalink|新田辺駅|Q7497135}}から徒歩15分 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *{{Wayback|url=http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ |title=棚倉孫神社 |date=20090225193248}}-（公式サイト） {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たなくらひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata name in kana (P1814) == * たなくらひこじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 1130005009064 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '京都府京田辺市田辺棚倉49', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:棚倉孫神社]] {{wikidata link|Q54153264}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 棚倉孫神社 |画像 = [[画像:Tanakurahiko Jinja Torii.jpg|270px]]
鳥居と拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|京都府|Q120730}}{{jalink|京田辺市|Q816728}}田辺棚倉49 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|天香山命|Q10940849|天香古山命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（大）
旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建 = {{jalink|推古天皇|Q298057}}31年（{{jalink|623年|Q31044}}） |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684}} |別名 = |例祭 = {{jalink|10月15日|Q2919}} |神事 = |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=棚倉孫神社|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''棚倉孫神社'''（たなくらひこじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|京都府|Q120730}}{{jalink|京田辺市|Q816728}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|式内大社|Q134917288}}で、{{jalink|旧社格}}は郷社。 === 歴史 === === 概史 === 社伝によると、{{jalink|推古天皇|Q298057}}31年（{{jalink|623年|Q31044}}）に{{jalink|相楽郡|Q1154661}}棚倉之荘から勧請されたとされる。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』では大社に列格していた。{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}には「天満宮」と呼ばれていた。{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}6年（{{jalink|1931年|Q18782}}）{{jalink|2月|Q109}}{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}に列格した。 === 神階 === *{{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下から従五位上（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』）- 表記は「棚倉孫神」 === 文化財 === *本殿（{{jalink|京都府|Q120730}}{{jalink|登録有形文化財|Q11579194}}） {{jalink|桃山時代}}の建立。 *瑞饋神輿（{{jalink|京田辺市|Q816728}}無形文化財） 例祭に合わせて、瑞饋・唐辛子・金柑・千日紅・白米・豆類等を使用して瑞饋神輿（ずいきみこし）を製作し、{{jalink|10月|Q124}}{{jalink|体育の日}}に氏子区域を巡行する。 Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|本殿 Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|瑞饋神輿 === 交通アクセス === *{{jalink|西日本旅客鉄道|Q502125|JR西日本}}{{jalink|学研都市線}}{{jalink|京田辺駅|Q855813}}から徒歩10分 *{{jalink|近畿日本鉄道|Q1531085|近鉄}}{{jalink|近鉄京都線|Q1057349|京都線}}{{jalink|新田辺駅|Q7497135}}から徒歩15分 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *{{Wayback|url=http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ |title=棚倉孫神社 |date=20090225193248}}-（公式サイト） {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たなくらひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市の建築物]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] [[Category:山城国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

name in kana (P1814) == * たなくらひこじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 1130005009064 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '京都府京田辺市田辺棚倉49', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:棚倉孫神社]] {{wikidata link|Q54153264}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 棚倉孫神社 |画像 = [[画像:Tanakurahiko Jinja Torii.jpg|270px]]
鳥居と拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|京都府|Q120730}}{{jalink|京田辺市|Q816728}}田辺棚倉49 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|天香山命|Q10940849|天香古山命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（大）
旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建 = {{jalink|推古天皇|Q298057}}31年（{{jalink|623年|Q31044}}） |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684}} |別名 = |例祭 = {{jalink|10月15日|Q2919}} |神事 = |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=棚倉孫神社|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''棚倉孫神社'''（たなくらひこじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|京都府|Q120730}}{{jalink|京田辺市|Q816728}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|式内大社|Q134917288}}で、{{jalink|旧社格}}は郷社。 === 歴史 === === 概史 === 社伝によると、{{jalink|推古天皇|Q298057}}31年（{{jalink|623年|Q31044}}）に{{jalink|相楽郡|Q1154661}}棚倉之荘から勧請されたとされる。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』では大社に列格していた。{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}には「天満宮」と呼ばれていた。{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}6年（{{jalink|1931年|Q18782}}）{{jalink|2月|Q109}}{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}に列格した。 === 神階 === *{{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下から従五位上（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』）- 表記は「棚倉孫神」 === 文化財 === *本殿（{{jalink|京都府|Q120730}}{{jalink|登録有形文化財|Q11579194}}） {{jalink|桃山時代}}の建立。 *瑞饋神輿（{{jalink|京田辺市|Q816728}}無形文化財） 例祭に合わせて、瑞饋・唐辛子・金柑・千日紅・白米・豆類等を使用して瑞饋神輿（ずいきみこし）を製作し、{{jalink|10月|Q124}}{{jalink|体育の日}}に氏子区域を巡行する。 Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|本殿 Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|瑞饋神輿 === 交通アクセス === *{{jalink|西日本旅客鉄道|Q502125|JR西日本}}{{jalink|学研都市線}}{{jalink|京田辺駅|Q855813}}から徒歩10分 *{{jalink|近畿日本鉄道|Q1531085|近鉄}}{{jalink|近鉄京都線|Q1057349|京都線}}{{jalink|新田辺駅|Q7497135}}から徒歩15分 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *{{Wayback|url=http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ |title=棚倉孫神社 |date=20090225193248}}-（公式サイト） {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たなくらひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市の建築物]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] [[Category:山城国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

name in kana (P1814) == * たなくらひこじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 1130005009064 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '京都府京田辺市田辺棚倉49', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:棚倉孫神社]] {{wikidata link|Q54153264}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 棚倉孫神社 |画像 = [[画像:Tanakurahiko Jinja Torii.jpg|270px]]
鳥居と拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|京都府|Q120730}}{{jalink|京田辺市|Q816728}}田辺棚倉49 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|天香山命|Q10940849|天香古山命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（大）
旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建 = {{jalink|推古天皇|Q298057}}31年（{{jalink|623年|Q31044}}） |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684}} |別名 = |例祭 = {{jalink|10月15日|Q2919}} |神事 = |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=棚倉孫神社|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''棚倉孫神社'''（たなくらひこじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|京都府|Q120730}}{{jalink|京田辺市|Q816728}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|式内大社|Q134917288}}で、{{jalink|旧社格}}は郷社。 === 歴史 === === 概史 === 社伝によると、{{jalink|推古天皇|Q298057}}31年（{{jalink|623年|Q31044}}）に{{jalink|相楽郡|Q1154661}}棚倉之荘から勧請されたとされる。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』では大社に列格していた。{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}には「天満宮」と呼ばれていた。{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}6年（{{jalink|1931年|Q18782}}）{{jalink|2月|Q109}}{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}に列格した。 === 神階 === *{{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下から従五位上（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』）- 表記は「棚倉孫神」 === 文化財 === *本殿（{{jalink|京都府|Q120730}}{{jalink|登録有形文化財|Q11579194}}） {{jalink|桃山時代}}の建立。 *瑞饋神輿（{{jalink|京田辺市|Q816728}}無形文化財） 例祭に合わせて、瑞饋・唐辛子・金柑・千日紅・白米・豆類等を使用して瑞饋神輿（ずいきみこし）を製作し、{{jalink|10月|Q124}}{{jalink|体育の日}}に氏子区域を巡行する。 Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|本殿 Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|瑞饋神輿 === 交通アクセス === *{{jalink|西日本旅客鉄道|Q502125|JR西日本}}{{jalink|学研都市線}}{{jalink|京田辺駅|Q855813}}から徒歩10分 *{{jalink|近畿日本鉄道|Q1531085|近鉄}}{{jalink|近鉄京都線|Q1057349|京都線}}{{jalink|新田辺駅|Q7497135}}から徒歩15分 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *{{Wayback|url=http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ |title=棚倉孫神社 |date=20090225193248}}-（公式サイト） {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たなくらひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市の建築物]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] [[Category:山城国の式内社]] name in kana (P1814) == * たなくらひこじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 1130005009064 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '京都府京田辺市田辺棚倉49', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:棚倉孫神社]] {{wikidata link|Q54153264}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 棚倉孫神社 |画像 = [[画像:Tanakurahiko Jinja Torii.jpg|270px]]
鳥居と拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|京都府|Q120730}}{{jalink|京田辺市|Q816728}}田辺棚倉49 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|天香山命|Q10940849|天香古山命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（大）
旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建 = {{jalink|推古天皇|Q298057}}31年（{{jalink|623年|Q31044}}） |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684}} |別名 = |例祭 = {{jalink|10月15日|Q2919}} |神事 = |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=棚倉孫神社|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''棚倉孫神社'''（たなくらひこじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|京都府|Q120730}}{{jalink|京田辺市|Q816728}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。{{jalink|式内大社|Q134917288}}で、{{jalink|旧社格}}は郷社。 === 歴史 === === 概史 === 社伝によると、{{jalink|推古天皇|Q298057}}31年（{{jalink|623年|Q31044}}）に{{jalink|相楽郡|Q1154661}}棚倉之荘から勧請されたとされる。『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』では大社に列格していた。{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}には「天満宮」と呼ばれていた。{{jalink|昭和|Q327567}}6年（{{jalink|1931年|Q18782}}）{{jalink|2月|Q109}}{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}に列格した。 === 神階 === *{{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下から従五位上（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』）- 表記は「棚倉孫神」 === 文化財 === *本殿（{{jalink|京都府|Q120730}}{{jalink|登録有形文化財|Q11579194}}） {{jalink|桃山時代}}の建立。 *瑞饋神輿（{{jalink|京田辺市|Q816728}}無形文化財） 例祭に合わせて、瑞饋・唐辛子・金柑・千日紅・白米・豆類等を使用して瑞饋神輿（ずいきみこし）を製作し、{{jalink|10月|Q124}}{{jalink|体育の日}}に氏子区域を巡行する。 Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|本殿 Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|瑞饋神輿 === 交通アクセス === *{{jalink|西日本旅客鉄道|Q502125|JR西日本}}{{jalink|学研都市線}}{{jalink|京田辺駅|Q855813}}から徒歩10分 *{{jalink|近畿日本鉄道|Q1531085|近鉄}}{{jalink|近鉄京都線|Q1057349|京都線}}{{jalink|新田辺駅|Q7497135}}から徒歩15分 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *{{Wayback|url=http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ |title=棚倉孫神社 |date=20090225193248}}-（公式サイト） {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たなくらひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市の建築物]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] name in kana (P1814) == * たなくらひこじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 1130005009064 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '京都府京田辺市田辺棚倉49', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:棚倉孫神社]] {{wikidata link|Q54153264}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tanakurahiko Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Tanakurahiko Jinja Torii.jpg|270px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}}{{jalink|Kyōtanabe|Q816728}} Tanabe Tanakura 49 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Amenokaguyama-no-Mikoto|Q10940849|Amenokoyane-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (major shrine)
former {{jalink|gōsha|Q134917316}} |創建 = {{jalink|Empress Suiko|Q298057}} 31 ({{jalink|623|Q31044}}) |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684}} |別名 = |例祭 = {{jalink|October 15|Q2919}} |神事 = |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Tanakurahiko Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Tanakurahiko Shrine''' (たなくらひこじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Kyōtanabe|Q816728}}, {{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288}}, and its former shrine rank was gōsha. === History === === Outline === According to shrine tradition, it was invited in {{jalink|Empress Suiko|Q298057}} 31 ({{jalink|623|Q31044}}) from Tanakura-no-shō in {{jalink|Sōraku District|Q1154661}}. In the ''{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}'', it was listed as a major shrine. In the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}} it was called "Tenmangū." In {{jalink|Shōwa|Q327567}} 6 ({{jalink|1931|Q18782}}), in {{jalink|February|Q109}}, it was ranked as a {{jalink|gōsha|Q134917316}}. === Divine rank === *{{jalink|Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|Ten'an}} 3 ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), {{jalink|January 27|Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{jalink|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981}}'') - listed as "Tanakurahiko-no-kami" === Cultural properties === *Main sanctuary ({{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}} {{jalink|Registered Tangible Cultural Property|Q11579194}}) Built in the {{jalink|Momoyama period}}. *Zuiki mikoshi ({{jalink|Kyōtanabe|Q816728}} Intangible Cultural Property) For the annual festival, a zuiki mikoshi is made using taro stalks, chili peppers, kumquats, globe amaranth, white rice, beans, etc., and it parades through the ujiko district on {{jalink|October|Q124}} {{jalink|Health and Sports Day}}. Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|Main sanctuary Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|Zuiki mikoshi === Access === *10 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Kyōtanabe Station|Q855813}} on the {{jalink|Gakkentoshi Line}} of {{jalink|West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|JR West}} *15 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Shin-Tanabe Station|Q7497135}} on the {{jalink|Kyoto Line|Q1057349|Kintetsu Kyoto Line}} of {{jalink|Kintetsu|Q1531085|Kintetsu Railway}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ |title=棚倉孫神社 |date=20090225193248}}- (official site) {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たなくらひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市の建築物]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] [[Category:山城国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

link|Q54153264}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tanakurahiko Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Tanakurahiko Jinja Torii.jpg|270px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}}{{jalink|Kyōtanabe|Q816728}} Tanabe Tanakura 49 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Amenokaguyama-no-Mikoto|Q10940849|Amenokoyane-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (major shrine)
former {{jalink|gōsha|Q134917316}} |創建 = {{jalink|Empress Suiko|Q298057}} 31 ({{jalink|623|Q31044}}) |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684}} |別名 = |例祭 = {{jalink|October 15|Q2919}} |神事 = |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Tanakurahiko Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Tanakurahiko Shrine''' (たなくらひこじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Kyōtanabe|Q816728}}, {{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288}}, and its former shrine rank was gōsha. === History === === Outline === According to shrine tradition, it was invited in {{jalink|Empress Suiko|Q298057}} 31 ({{jalink|623|Q31044}}) from Tanakura-no-shō in {{jalink|Sōraku District|Q1154661}}. In the ''{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}'', it was listed as a major shrine. In the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}} it was called "Tenmangū." In {{jalink|Shōwa|Q327567}} 6 ({{jalink|1931|Q18782}}), in {{jalink|February|Q109}}, it was ranked as a {{jalink|gōsha|Q134917316}}. === Divine rank === *{{jalink|Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|Ten'an}} 3 ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), {{jalink|January 27|Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{jalink|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981}}'') - listed as "Tanakurahiko-no-kami" === Cultural properties === *Main sanctuary ({{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}} {{jalink|Registered Tangible Cultural Property|Q11579194}}) Built in the {{jalink|Momoyama period}}. *Zuiki mikoshi ({{jalink|Kyōtanabe|Q816728}} Intangible Cultural Property) For the annual festival, a zuiki mikoshi is made using taro stalks, chili peppers, kumquats, globe amaranth, white rice, beans, etc., and it parades through the ujiko district on {{jalink|October|Q124}} {{jalink|Health and Sports Day}}. Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|Main sanctuary Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|Zuiki mikoshi === Access === *10 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Kyōtanabe Station|Q855813}} on the {{jalink|Gakkentoshi Line}} of {{jalink|West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|JR West}} *15 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Shin-Tanabe Station|Q7497135}} on the {{jalink|Kyoto Line|Q1057349|Kintetsu Kyoto Line}} of {{jalink|Kintetsu|Q1531085|Kintetsu Railway}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ |title=棚倉孫神社 |date=20090225193248}}- (official site) {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たなくらひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市の建築物]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] [[Category:山城国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

Ollama and DeepSeek were too bad to actually use. see categorization since some of them are very questionable, especially if there was a massive decrease in page size or the {{jawiki| template is minimal or absent on the page

link|Q54153264}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tanakurahiko Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Tanakurahiko Jinja Torii.jpg|270px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}}{{jalink|Kyōtanabe|Q816728}} Tanabe Tanakura 49 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Amenokaguyama-no-Mikoto|Q10940849|Amenokoyane-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (major shrine)
former {{jalink|gōsha|Q134917316}} |創建 = {{jalink|Empress Suiko|Q298057}} 31 ({{jalink|623|Q31044}}) |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684}} |別名 = |例祭 = {{jalink|October 15|Q2919}} |神事 = |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Tanakurahiko Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Tanakurahiko Shrine''' (たなくらひこじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Kyōtanabe|Q816728}}, {{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288}}, and its former shrine rank was gōsha. === History === === Outline === According to shrine tradition, it was invited in {{jalink|Empress Suiko|Q298057}} 31 ({{jalink|623|Q31044}}) from Tanakura-no-shō in {{jalink|Sōraku District|Q1154661}}. In the ''{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}'', it was listed as a major shrine. In the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}} it was called "Tenmangū." In {{jalink|Shōwa|Q327567}} 6 ({{jalink|1931|Q18782}}), in {{jalink|February|Q109}}, it was ranked as a {{jalink|gōsha|Q134917316}}. === Divine rank === *{{jalink|Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|Ten'an}} 3 ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), {{jalink|January 27|Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{jalink|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981}}'') - listed as "Tanakurahiko-no-kami" === Cultural properties === *Main sanctuary ({{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}} {{jalink|Registered Tangible Cultural Property|Q11579194}}) Built in the {{jalink|Momoyama period}}. *Zuiki mikoshi ({{jalink|Kyōtanabe|Q816728}} Intangible Cultural Property) For the annual festival, a zuiki mikoshi is made using taro stalks, chili peppers, kumquats, globe amaranth, white rice, beans, etc., and it parades through the ujiko district on {{jalink|October|Q124}} {{jalink|Health and Sports Day}}. Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|Main sanctuary Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|Zuiki mikoshi === Access === *10 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Kyōtanabe Station|Q855813}} on the {{jalink|Gakkentoshi Line}} of {{jalink|West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|JR West}} *15 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Shin-Tanabe Station|Q7497135}} on the {{jalink|Kyoto Line|Q1057349|Kintetsu Kyoto Line}} of {{jalink|Kintetsu|Q1531085|Kintetsu Railway}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ |title=棚倉孫神社 |date=20090225193248}}- (official site) {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たなくらひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市の建築物]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] [[Category:山城国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}}{{jalink|Kyōtanabe|Q816728}} Tanabe Tanakura 49 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Amenokaguyama-no-Mikoto|Q10940849|Amenokoyane-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (major shrine)
former {{jalink|gōsha|Q134917316}} |創建 = {{jalink|Empress Suiko|Q298057}} 31 ({{jalink|623|Q31044}}) |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684}} |別名 = |例祭 = {{jalink|October 15|Q2919}} |神事 = |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Tanakurahiko Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Tanakurahiko Shrine''' (たなくらひこじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Kyōtanabe|Q816728}}, {{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288}}, and its former shrine rank was gōsha. === History === === Outline === According to shrine tradition, it was invited in {{jalink|Empress Suiko|Q298057}} 31 ({{jalink|623|Q31044}}) from Tanakura-no-shō in {{jalink|Sōraku District|Q1154661}}. In the ''{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}'', it was listed as a major shrine. In the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}} it was called "Tenmangū." In {{jalink|Shōwa|Q327567}} 6 ({{jalink|1931|Q18782}}), in {{jalink|February|Q109}}, it was ranked as a {{jalink|gōsha|Q134917316}}. === Divine rank === *{{jalink|Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|Ten'an}} 3 ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), {{jalink|January 27|Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{jalink|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981}}'') - listed as "Tanakurahiko-no-kami" === Cultural properties === *Main sanctuary ({{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}} {{jalink|Registered Tangible Cultural Property|Q11579194}}) Built in the {{jalink|Momoyama period}}. *Zuiki mikoshi ({{jalink|Kyōtanabe|Q816728}} Intangible Cultural Property) For the annual festival, a zuiki mikoshi is made using taro stalks, chili peppers, kumquats, globe amaranth, white rice, beans, etc., and it parades through the ujiko district on {{jalink|October|Q124}} {{jalink|Health and Sports Day}}. Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|Main sanctuary Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|Zuiki mikoshi === Access === *10 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Kyōtanabe Station|Q855813}} on the {{jalink|Gakkentoshi Line}} of {{jalink|West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|JR West}} *15 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Shin-Tanabe Station|Q7497135}} on the {{jalink|Kyoto Line|Q1057349|Kintetsu Kyoto Line}} of {{jalink|Kintetsu|Q1531085|Kintetsu Railway}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ |title=棚倉孫神社 |date=20090225193248}}- (official site) {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たなくらひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市の建築物]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] [[Category:山城国の式内社]] [[Category:need translation]]

link|Q54153264}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tanakurahiko Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Tanakurahiko Jinja Torii.jpg|270px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}}{{jalink|Kyōtanabe|Q816728}} Tanabe Tanakura 49 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Amenokaguyama-no-Mikoto|Q10940849|Amenokoyane-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (major shrine)
former {{jalink|gōsha|Q134917316}} |創建 = {{jalink|Empress Suiko|Q298057}} 31 ({{jalink|623|Q31044}}) |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684}} |別名 = |例祭 = {{jalink|October 15|Q2919}} |神事 = |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Tanakurahiko Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Tanakurahiko Shrine''' (たなくらひこじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Kyōtanabe|Q816728}}, {{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288}}, and its former shrine rank was gōsha. === History === === Outline === According to shrine tradition, it was invited in {{jalink|Empress Suiko|Q298057}} 31 ({{jalink|623|Q31044}}) from Tanakura-no-shō in {{jalink|Sōraku District|Q1154661}}. In the ''{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}'', it was listed as a major shrine. In the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}} it was called "Tenmangū." In {{jalink|Shōwa|Q327567}} 6 ({{jalink|1931|Q18782}}), in {{jalink|February|Q109}}, it was ranked as a {{jalink|gōsha|Q134917316}}. === Divine rank === *{{jalink|Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|Ten'an}} 3 ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), {{jalink|January 27|Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{jalink|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981}}'') - listed as "Tanakurahiko-no-kami" === Cultural properties === *Main sanctuary ({{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}} {{jalink|Registered Tangible Cultural Property|Q11579194}}) Built in the {{jalink|Momoyama period}}. *Zuiki mikoshi ({{jalink|Kyōtanabe|Q816728}} Intangible Cultural Property) For the annual festival, a zuiki mikoshi is made using taro stalks, chili peppers, kumquats, globe amaranth, white rice, beans, etc., and it parades through the ujiko district on {{jalink|October|Q124}} {{jalink|Health and Sports Day}}. Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|Main sanctuary Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|Zuiki mikoshi === Access === *10 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Kyōtanabe Station|Q855813}} on the {{jalink|Gakkentoshi Line}} of {{jalink|West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|JR West}} *15 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Shin-Tanabe Station|Q7497135}} on the {{jalink|Kyoto Line|Q1057349|Kintetsu Kyoto Line}} of {{jalink|Kintetsu|Q1531085|Kintetsu Railway}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ |title=棚倉孫神社 |date=20090225193248}}- (official site) {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たなくらひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市の建築物]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] [[Category:山城国の式内社]][[Category:qq]]

name in kana (P1814) == * たなくらひこじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 1130005009064 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '京都府京田辺市田辺棚倉49', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:棚倉孫神社]] {{wikidata link|Q54153264}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tanakurahiko Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Tanakurahiko Jinja Torii.jpg|270px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}}{{jalink|Kyōtanabe|Q816728}} Tanabe Tanakura 49 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Amenokaguyama-no-Mikoto|Q10940849|Amenokoyane-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (major shrine)
former {{jalink|gōsha|Q134917316}} |創建 = {{jalink|Empress Suiko|Q298057}} 31 ({{jalink|623|Q31044}}) |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684}} |別名 = |例祭 = {{jalink|October 15|Q2919}} |神事 = |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Tanakurahiko Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Tanakurahiko Shrine''' (たなくらひこじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Kyōtanabe|Q816728}}, {{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288}}, and its former shrine rank was gōsha. === History === === Outline === According to shrine tradition, it was invited in {{jalink|Empress Suiko|Q298057}} 31 ({{jalink|623|Q31044}}) from Tanakura-no-shō in {{jalink|Sōraku District|Q1154661}}. In the ''{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}'', it was listed as a major shrine. In the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}} it was called "Tenmangū." In {{jalink|Shōwa|Q327567}} 6 ({{jalink|1931|Q18782}}), in {{jalink|February|Q109}}, it was ranked as a {{jalink|gōsha|Q134917316}}. === Divine rank === *{{jalink|Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|Ten'an}} 3 ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), {{jalink|January 27|Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{jalink|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981}}'') - listed as "Tanakurahiko-no-kami" === Cultural properties === *Main sanctuary ({{jalink|Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730}} {{jalink|Registered Tangible Cultural Property|Q11579194}}) Built in the {{jalink|Momoyama period}}. *Zuiki mikoshi ({{jalink|Kyōtanabe|Q816728}} Intangible Cultural Property) For the annual festival, a zuiki mikoshi is made using taro stalks, chili peppers, kumquats, globe amaranth, white rice, beans, etc., and it parades through the ujiko district on {{jalink|October|Q124}} {{jalink|Health and Sports Day}}. Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|Main sanctuary Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|Zuiki mikoshi === Access === *10 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Kyōtanabe Station|Q855813}} on the {{jalink|Gakkentoshi Line}} of {{jalink|West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|JR West}} *15 minutes on foot from {{jalink|Shin-Tanabe Station|Q7497135}} on the {{jalink|Kyoto Line|Q1057349|Kintetsu Kyoto Line}} of {{jalink|Kintetsu|Q1531085|Kintetsu Railway}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ |title=棚倉孫神社 |date=20090225193248}}- (official site) {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たなくらひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市の建築物]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] [[Category:山城国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

name in kana (P1814) == * たなくらひこじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 1130005009064 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '京都府京田辺市田辺棚倉49', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:棚倉孫神社]] {{wikidata link|Q54153264}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tanakurahiko Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Tanakurahiko Jinja Torii.jpg|270px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730}}{{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728}} Tanabe Tanakura 49 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Amenokaguyama-no-Mikoto|Q10940849|WD=Q10940849|lt=Amenokoyane-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill||lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} (major shrine)
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=Empress Suiko|Q298057|WD=Q298057}} 31 ({{ill|lt=623|Q31044|WD=Q31044}}) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684}} |別名 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=October 15|Q2919|WD=Q2919}} |神事 = |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Tanakurahiko Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Tanakurahiko Shrine''' (たなくらひこじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728}}, {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288}}, and its former shrine rank was gōsha. === History === === Outline === According to shrine tradition, it was invited in {{ill|lt=Empress Suiko|Q298057|WD=Q298057}} 31 ({{ill|lt=623|Q31044|WD=Q31044}}) from Tanakura-no-shō in {{ill|lt=Sōraku District|Q1154661|WD=Q1154661}}. In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}'', it was listed as a major shrine. In the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963}} it was called "Tenmangū." In {{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|WD=Q327567}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1931|Q18782|WD=Q18782}}), in {{ill|lt=February|Q109|WD=Q109}}, it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981}}'') - listed as "Tanakurahiko-no-kami" === Cultural properties === *Main sanctuary ({{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730}} {{ill|lt=Registered Tangible Cultural Property|Q11579194|WD=Q11579194}}) Built in the {{ill||lt=Momoyama period|UNKNOWN}}. *Zuiki mikoshi ({{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728}} Intangible Cultural Property) For the annual festival, a zuiki mikoshi is made using taro stalks, chili peppers, kumquats, globe amaranth, white rice, beans, etc., and it parades through the ujiko district on {{ill|lt=October|Q124|WD=Q124}} {{ill||lt=Health and Sports Day|UNKNOWN}}. Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|Main sanctuary Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|Zuiki mikoshi === Access === *10 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe Station|Q855813|WD=Q855813}} on the {{ill||lt=Gakkentoshi Line|UNKNOWN}} of {{ill|lt=West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|WD=Q502125|lt=JR West}} *15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Shin-Tanabe Station|Q7497135|WD=Q7497135}} on the {{ill|lt=Kyoto Line|Q1057349|WD=Q1057349|lt=Kintetsu Kyoto Line}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085|lt=Kintetsu Railway}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ |title=棚倉孫神社 |date=20090225193248}}- (official site) {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たなくらひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市の建築物]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] [[Category:山城国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

link|Q54153264}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tanakurahiko Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Tanakurahiko Jinja Torii.jpg|270px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730}}{{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728}} Tanabe Tanakura 49 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Amenokaguyama-no-Mikoto|Q10940849|WD=Q10940849|lt=Amenokoyane-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} (major shrine)
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=Empress Suiko|Q298057|WD=Q298057}} 31 ({{ill|lt=623|Q31044|WD=Q31044}}) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684}} |別名 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=October 15|Q2919|WD=Q2919}} |神事 = |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Tanakurahiko Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Tanakurahiko Shrine''' (たなくらひこじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728}}, {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288}}, and its former shrine rank was gōsha. === History === === Outline === According to shrine tradition, it was invited in {{ill|lt=Empress Suiko|Q298057|WD=Q298057}} 31 ({{ill|lt=623|Q31044|WD=Q31044}}) from Tanakura-no-shō in {{ill|lt=Sōraku District|Q1154661|WD=Q1154661}}. In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}'', it was listed as a major shrine. In the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963}} it was called "Tenmangū." In {{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|WD=Q327567}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1931|Q18782|WD=Q18782}}), in {{ill|lt=February|Q109|WD=Q109}}, it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981}}'') - listed as "Tanakurahiko-no-kami" === Cultural properties === *Main sanctuary ({{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730}} {{ill|lt=Registered Tangible Cultural Property|Q11579194|WD=Q11579194}}) Built in the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Momoyama period|UNKNOWN}}. *Zuiki mikoshi ({{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728}} Intangible Cultural Property) For the annual festival, a zuiki mikoshi is made using taro stalks, chili peppers, kumquats, globe amaranth, white rice, beans, etc., and it parades through the ujiko district on {{ill|lt=October|Q124|WD=Q124}} {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Health and Sports Day|UNKNOWN}}. Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|Main sanctuary Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|Zuiki mikoshi === Access === *10 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe Station|Q855813|WD=Q855813}} on the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Gakkentoshi Line|UNKNOWN}} of {{ill|lt=West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|WD=Q502125|lt=JR West}} *15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Shin-Tanabe Station|Q7497135|WD=Q7497135}} on the {{ill|lt=Kyoto Line|Q1057349|WD=Q1057349|lt=Kintetsu Kyoto Line}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085|lt=Kintetsu Railway}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ |title=棚倉孫神社 |date=20090225193248}}- (official site) {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たなくらひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市の建築物]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] [[Category:山城国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

link|Q54153264}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tanakurahiko Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Tanakurahiko Jinja Torii.jpg|270px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730}}{{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728}} Tanabe Tanakura 49 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Amenokaguyama-no-Mikoto|Q10940849|WD=Q10940849|lt=Amenokoyane-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}} (major shrine)
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=Empress Suiko|Q298057|WD=Q298057}} 31 ({{ill|lt=623|Q31044|WD=Q31044}}) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684}} |別名 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=October 15|Q2919|WD=Q2919}} |神事 = |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Tanakurahiko Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Tanakurahiko Shrine''' (たなくらひこじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728}}, {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288}}, and its former shrine rank was gōsha. === History === === Outline === According to shrine tradition, it was invited in {{ill|lt=Empress Suiko|Q298057|WD=Q298057}} 31 ({{ill|lt=623|Q31044|WD=Q31044}}) from Tanakura-no-shō in {{ill|lt=Sōraku District|Q1154661|WD=Q1154661}}. In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}'', it was listed as a major shrine. In the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963}} it was called "Tenmangū." In {{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|WD=Q327567}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1931|Q18782|WD=Q18782}}), in {{ill|lt=February|Q109|WD=Q109}}, it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981}}'') - listed as "Tanakurahiko-no-kami" === Cultural properties === *Main sanctuary ({{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730}} {{ill|lt=Registered Tangible Cultural Property|Q11579194|WD=Q11579194}}) Built in the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Momoyama period|1=UNKNOWN}}. *Zuiki mikoshi ({{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728}} Intangible Cultural Property) For the annual festival, a zuiki mikoshi is made using taro stalks, chili peppers, kumquats, globe amaranth, white rice, beans, etc., and it parades through the ujiko district on {{ill|lt=October|Q124|WD=Q124}} {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Health and Sports Day|1=UNKNOWN}}. Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|Main sanctuary Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|Zuiki mikoshi === Access === *10 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe Station|Q855813|WD=Q855813}} on the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Gakkentoshi Line|1=UNKNOWN}} of {{ill|lt=West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|WD=Q502125|lt=JR West}} *15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Shin-Tanabe Station|Q7497135|WD=Q7497135}} on the {{ill|lt=Kyoto Line|Q1057349|WD=Q1057349|lt=Kintetsu Kyoto Line}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085|lt=Kintetsu Railway}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ |title=棚倉孫神社 |date=20090225193248}}- (official site) {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たなくらひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市の建築物]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] [[Category:山城国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

link|Q54153264}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tanakurahiko Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Tanakurahiko Jinja Torii.jpg|270px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730}}{{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728}} Tanabe Tanakura 49 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Amenokaguyama-no-Mikoto|Q10940849|WD=Q10940849|lt=Amenokoyane-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} (major shrine)
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=Empress Suiko|Q298057|WD=Q298057}} 31 ({{ill|lt=623|Q31044|WD=Q31044}}) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684}} |別名 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=October 15|Q2919|WD=Q2919}} |神事 = |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Tanakurahiko Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Tanakurahiko Shrine''' (たなくらひこじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728}}, {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288}}, and its former shrine rank was gōsha. === History === === Outline === According to shrine tradition, it was invited in {{ill|lt=Empress Suiko|Q298057|WD=Q298057}} 31 ({{ill|lt=623|Q31044|WD=Q31044}}) from Tanakura-no-shō in {{ill|lt=Sōraku District|Q1154661|WD=Q1154661}}. In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}'', it was listed as a major shrine. In the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963}} it was called "Tenmangū." In {{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|WD=Q327567}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1931|Q18782|WD=Q18782}}), in {{ill|lt=February|Q109|WD=Q109}}, it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981}}'') - listed as "Tanakurahiko-no-kami" === Cultural properties === *Main sanctuary ({{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730}} {{ill|lt=Registered Tangible Cultural Property|Q11579194|WD=Q11579194}}) Built in the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Momoyama period|1=UNKNOWN}}. *Zuiki mikoshi ({{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728}} Intangible Cultural Property) For the annual festival, a zuiki mikoshi is made using taro stalks, chili peppers, kumquats, globe amaranth, white rice, beans, etc., and it parades through the ujiko district on {{ill|lt=October|Q124|WD=Q124}} {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Health and Sports Day|1=UNKNOWN}}. Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|Main sanctuary Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|Zuiki mikoshi === Access === *10 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe Station|Q855813|WD=Q855813}} on the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Gakkentoshi Line|1=UNKNOWN}} of {{ill|lt=West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|WD=Q502125|lt=JR West}} *15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Shin-Tanabe Station|Q7497135|WD=Q7497135}} on the {{ill|lt=Kyoto Line|Q1057349|WD=Q1057349|lt=Kintetsu Kyoto Line}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085|lt=Kintetsu Railway}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ |title=棚倉孫神社 |date=20090225193248}}- (official site) {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たなくらひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市の建築物]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] [[Category:山城国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

name in kana (P1814) == * たなくらひこじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 1130005009064 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '京都府京田辺市田辺棚倉49', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:棚倉孫神社]] {{wikidata link|Q54153264}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tanakurahiko Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Tanakurahiko Jinja Torii.jpg|270px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730}}{{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728}} Tanabe Tanakura 49 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Amenokaguyama-no-Mikoto|Q10940849|WD=Q10940849|lt=Amenokoyane-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} (major shrine)
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=Empress Suiko|Q298057|WD=Q298057}} 31 ({{ill|lt=623|Q31044|WD=Q31044}}) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684}} |別名 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=October 15|Q2919|WD=Q2919}} |神事 = |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Tanakurahiko Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Tanakurahiko Shrine''' (たなくらひこじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} in {{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728}}, {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288}}, and its former shrine rank was gōsha. === History === === Outline === According to shrine tradition, it was invited in {{ill|lt=Empress Suiko|Q298057|WD=Q298057}} 31 ({{ill|lt=623|Q31044|WD=Q31044}}) from Tanakura-no-shō in {{ill|lt=Sōraku District|Q1154661|WD=Q1154661}}. In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}'', it was listed as a major shrine. In the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963}} it was called "Tenmangū." In {{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|WD=Q327567}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1931|Q18782|WD=Q18782}}), in {{ill|lt=February|Q109|WD=Q109}}, it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981}}'') - listed as "Tanakurahiko-no-kami" === Cultural properties === *Main sanctuary ({{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730}} {{ill|lt=Registered Tangible Cultural Property|Q11579194|WD=Q11579194}}) Built in the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Momoyama period|1=UNKNOWN}}. *Zuiki mikoshi ({{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728}} Intangible Cultural Property) For the annual festival, a zuiki mikoshi is made using taro stalks, chili peppers, kumquats, globe amaranth, white rice, beans, etc., and it parades through the ujiko district on {{ill|lt=October|Q124|WD=Q124}} {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Health and Sports Day|1=UNKNOWN}}. Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|Main sanctuary Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|Zuiki mikoshi === Access === *10 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe Station|Q855813|WD=Q855813}} on the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Gakkentoshi Line|1=UNKNOWN}} of {{ill|lt=West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|WD=Q502125|lt=JR West}} *15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Shin-Tanabe Station|Q7497135|WD=Q7497135}} on the {{ill|lt=Kyoto Line|Q1057349|WD=Q1057349|lt=Kintetsu Kyoto Line}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085|lt=Kintetsu Railway}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ |title=棚倉孫神社 |date=20090225193248}}- (official site) {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たなくらひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市の建築物]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] [[Category:山城国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * たなくらひこじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 1130005009064 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '京都府京田辺市田辺棚倉49', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:棚倉孫神社]] {{wikidata link|Q54153264}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tanakurahiko Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Tanakurahiko Jinja Torii.jpg|270px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728|1=Kyōtanabe}} Tanabe Tanakura 49 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Amenokaguyama-no-Mikoto|Q10940849|WD=Q10940849|lt=Amenokoyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Kaguyama}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (major shrine)
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=Empress Suiko|Q298057|WD=Q298057|1=Empress Suiko}} 31 ({{ill|lt=623|Q31044|WD=Q31044|1=623}}) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=October 15|Q2919|WD=Q2919|1=October 15}} |神事 = |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Tanakurahiko Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Tanakurahiko Shrine''' (たなくらひこじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728|1=Kyōtanabe}}, {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}, and its former shrine rank was gōsha. === History === === Outline === According to shrine tradition, it was invited in {{ill|lt=Empress Suiko|Q298057|WD=Q298057|1=Empress Suiko}} 31 ({{ill|lt=623|Q31044|WD=Q31044|1=623}}) from Tanakura-no-shō in {{ill|lt=Sōraku District|Q1154661|WD=Q1154661|1=Sōraku District, Kyoto}}. In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}'', it was listed as a major shrine. In the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}} it was called "Tenmangū." In {{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|WD=Q327567|1=Shōwa era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1931|Q18782|WD=Q18782|1=1931}}), in {{ill|lt=February|Q109|WD=Q109|1=February}}, it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') - listed as "Tanakurahiko-no-kami" === Cultural properties === *Main sanctuary ({{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}} {{ill|lt=Registered Tangible Cultural Property|Q11579194|WD=Q11579194|1=Registered Tangible Cultural Property of Japan}}) Built in the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Momoyama period|1=UNKNOWN}}. *Zuiki mikoshi ({{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728|1=Kyōtanabe}} Intangible Cultural Property) For the annual festival, a zuiki mikoshi is made using taro stalks, chili peppers, kumquats, globe amaranth, white rice, beans, etc., and it parades through the ujiko district on {{ill|lt=October|Q124|WD=Q124|1=October}} {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Health and Sports Day|1=UNKNOWN}}. Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|Main sanctuary Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|Zuiki mikoshi === Access === *10 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe Station|Q855813|WD=Q855813|1=Kyōtanabe Station}} on the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Gakkentoshi Line|1=UNKNOWN}} of {{ill|lt=West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|WD=Q502125|lt=JR West|1=West Japan Railway Company}} *15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Shin-Tanabe Station|Q7497135|WD=Q7497135|1=Shin-Tanabe Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kyoto Line|Q1057349|WD=Q1057349|lt=Kintetsu Kyoto Line|1=Kyoto Line (Kintetsu)}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085|lt=Kintetsu Railway|1=Kintetsu Railway}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ |title=棚倉孫神社 |date=20090225193248}}- (official site) {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たなくらひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市の建築物]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] [[Category:山城国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * たなくらひこじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 1130005009064 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '京都府京田辺市田辺棚倉49', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:棚倉孫神社]] {{wikidata link|Q54153264}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tanakurahiko Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Tanakurahiko Jinja Torii.jpg|270px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728|1=Kyōtanabe}} Tanabe Tanakura 49 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Amenokaguyama-no-Mikoto|Q10940849|WD=Q10940849|lt=Amenokoyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Kaguyama}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (major shrine)
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=Empress Suiko|Q298057|WD=Q298057|1=Empress Suiko}} 31 ({{ill|lt=623|Q31044|WD=Q31044|1=623}}) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=October 15|Q2919|WD=Q2919|1=October 15}} |神事 = |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Tanakurahiko Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Tanakurahiko Shrine''' (たなくらひこじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728|1=Kyōtanabe}}, {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}, and its former shrine rank was gōsha. === History === === Outline === According to shrine tradition, it was invited in {{ill|lt=Empress Suiko|Q298057|WD=Q298057|1=Empress Suiko}} 31 ({{ill|lt=623|Q31044|WD=Q31044|1=623}}) from Tanakura-no-shō in {{ill|lt=Sōraku District|Q1154661|WD=Q1154661|1=Sōraku District, Kyoto}}. In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}'', it was listed as a major shrine. In the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}} it was called "Tenmangū." In {{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|WD=Q327567|1=Shōwa era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1931|Q18782|WD=Q18782|1=1931}}), in {{ill|lt=February|Q109|WD=Q109|1=February}}, it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') - listed as "Tanakurahiko-no-kami" === Cultural properties === *Main sanctuary ({{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}} {{ill|lt=Registered Tangible Cultural Property|Q11579194|WD=Q11579194|1=Registered Tangible Cultural Property of Japan}}) Built in the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Momoyama period|1=UNKNOWN}}. *Zuiki mikoshi ({{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728|1=Kyōtanabe}} Intangible Cultural Property) For the annual festival, a zuiki mikoshi is made using taro stalks, chili peppers, kumquats, globe amaranth, white rice, beans, etc., and it parades through the ujiko district on {{ill|lt=October|Q124|WD=Q124|1=October}} {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Health and Sports Day|1=UNKNOWN}}. Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|Main sanctuary Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|Zuiki mikoshi === Access === *10 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe Station|Q855813|WD=Q855813|1=Kyōtanabe Station}} on the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Gakkentoshi Line|1=UNKNOWN}} of {{ill|lt=West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|WD=Q502125|lt=JR West|1=West Japan Railway Company}} *15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Shin-Tanabe Station|Q7497135|WD=Q7497135|1=Shin-Tanabe Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kyoto Line|Q1057349|WD=Q1057349|lt=Kintetsu Kyoto Line|1=Kyoto Line (Kintetsu)}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085|lt=Kintetsu Railway|1=Kintetsu Railway}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ |title=棚倉孫神社 |date=20090225193248}}- (official site) {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たなくらひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市の建築物]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] [[Category:山城国の式内社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * たなくらひこじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 1130005009064 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '京都府京田辺市田辺棚倉49', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:棚倉孫神社]] {{wikidata link|Q54153264}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tanakurahiko Shrine |画像 = [[画像:Tanakurahiko Jinja Torii.jpg|270px]]
Torii and haiden |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728|1=Kyōtanabe}} Tanabe Tanakura 49 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Amenokaguyama-no-Mikoto|Q10940849|WD=Q10940849|lt=Amenokoyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Kaguyama}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (major shrine)
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=Empress Suiko|Q298057|WD=Q298057|1=Empress Suiko}} 31 ({{ill|lt=623|Q31044|WD=Q31044|1=623}}) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=October 15|Q2919|WD=Q2919|1=October 15}} |神事 = |地図= {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Tanakurahiko Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Tanakurahiko Shrine''' (たなくらひこじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728|1=Kyōtanabe}}, {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288|WD=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}, and its former shrine rank was gōsha. === History === === Outline === According to shrine tradition, it was invited in {{ill|lt=Empress Suiko|Q298057|WD=Q298057|1=Empress Suiko}} 31 ({{ill|lt=623|Q31044|WD=Q31044|1=623}}) from Tanakura-no-shō in {{ill|lt=Sōraku District|Q1154661|WD=Q1154661|1=Sōraku District, Kyoto}}. In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}'', it was listed as a major shrine. In the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}} it was called "Tenmangū." In {{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|WD=Q327567|1=Shōwa era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1931|Q18782|WD=Q18782|1=1931}}), in {{ill|lt=February|Q109|WD=Q109|1=February}}, it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Divine rank === *{{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') - listed as "Tanakurahiko-no-kami" === Cultural properties === *Main sanctuary ({{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|WD=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}} {{ill|lt=Registered Tangible Cultural Property|Q11579194|WD=Q11579194|1=Registered Tangible Cultural Property of Japan}}) Built in the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Momoyama period|1=UNKNOWN}}. *Zuiki mikoshi ({{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe|Q816728|WD=Q816728|1=Kyōtanabe}} Intangible Cultural Property) For the annual festival, a zuiki mikoshi is made using taro stalks, chili peppers, kumquats, globe amaranth, white rice, beans, etc., and it parades through the ujiko district on {{ill|lt=October|Q124|WD=Q124|1=October}} {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Health and Sports Day|1=UNKNOWN}}. Tanakurahiko Jinja Honden.jpg|Main sanctuary Zuiki Mikoshi Tanakurahiko Jinja.jpg|Zuiki mikoshi === Access === *10 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Kyōtanabe Station|Q855813|WD=Q855813|1=Kyōtanabe Station}} on the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Gakkentoshi Line|1=UNKNOWN}} of {{ill|lt=West Japan Railway Company|Q502125|WD=Q502125|lt=JR West|1=West Japan Railway Company}} *15 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Shin-Tanabe Station|Q7497135|WD=Q7497135|1=Shin-Tanabe Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kyoto Line|Q1057349|WD=Q1057349|lt=Kintetsu Kyoto Line|1=Kyoto Line (Kintetsu)}} of {{ill|lt=Kintetsu|Q1531085|WD=Q1531085|lt=Kintetsu Railway|1=Kintetsu Railway}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *{{Wayback|url=http://www7b.biglobe.ne.jp/~tanakurahiko/ |title=棚倉孫神社 |date=20090225193248}}- (official site) {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たなくらひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tanakurahiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:京都府の神社]] [[Category:京田辺市の建築物]] [[Category:京田辺市の歴史]] [[Category:山城国の式内社]][[Category:qq]]
